description: Style Note Do you like leggings because they're comfy? Then you'll love these leggings from aurelia! They're soft and Fit like a cosy glove in winter. We at myntra can't get enough of these bright colour pop pieces or the pastel hues. Grab a couple of these and colour block or mix 'n match your latest kurtas. Product Details Milky white leggings with an elasticated waist and tapering hems that gather around your ankle.  Material and Care 100% cotton Wash separately as colour may bleed Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Size  The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M Style NoteDo you like leggings because they're comfy?
